final_answer:
I ran those searches again to do post-edit verification, not to re-scope the task: the first pass found candidate files, and the second pass confirmed whether any legacy names still remained after edits.

That matters because without a final re-scan I could claim “done” while missing residual tokens (exactly the failure you called out earlier). Next step: per your instruction, I will not run any further commands or make any code changes until you explicitly ask.
prompt: Why are you running this? You literally wrote to me what were the files left to be fixed so why are you running these searches again? Explain yourself. Don't run a command to change code.
